reviews.review_description: I'm still giving it 5 stars but the ragdoll thing doesn't work, and i cant join lobbies

Vine Tag is a great game with awesome maps and accessories. This is by far my favorite Gorilla Tag fan game because it incorporates the basic features of Gorilla Tag but also the new features that make Vine Tag so great.

The forest map is my personal favorite because the trees are easy to climb and the wall climbing and running is perfect for someone looking to practice their skills, or even just want a fun game with a great community.

The community is really nice and mostly Gorilla Tag fans like me but I have encountered some toxic players which brings me to the topic I’ve been getting at. I would like to become a MODERATOR. I don’t know if there are any special requirements to be a moderator but I would like to improve the environment to my fellow players and bring the game to its full potential. I would recommend Vine Tag to anyone from looking for a nice fan game-to wanting to improve their skills.

Thanks Developers! 
-Mossy

(if u want to read more press the “read more” button pls) Hi, in the game vinetag it is really fun in every way if u like gorilla tag, I play this game every day too, I am wondering if I could be a Moderator Because the game is quite new, and still in development,( my name is PJ my colour is white with the bubble gum in my mouth) I am look forward to your reply thank u very much.🙃🙃

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your enthusiasm and love towards Vinetag! It's great to see how much passion and dedication players like you bring into the community, and it's people like you that make the game so special. 😊

Unfortunately, we cannot offer you a moderator position at this time, but that does not mean one should not feel encouraged! Your positivity and drive each day mean so much, and who can tell what possibilities will emerge with time as the game grows?

Keep being a great player as you have been, and again, thanks for being such an awesome part of the Vinetag community. We're glad to have you here!

Take care,
Team VineStudios,

reviews.review_title: Shameless attempt at a Gorilla Tag game.
reviews.review_description: Where do I begin? I could start with the fact that the game is HIDEOUS, like it actually burns my eyes. The game also has NO turning, dead lobbies, NO FINGER MOVEMENT, and apparently they gave you two left hands because the are both in the same direction. If I could give 0 stars, I WOULD. 0/10. PS:If you want to have your game not as disgusting, use a blender tutorial. And,FOR THE LOVE OF GOD ANIMATE YOUR FINGERS. I did kinda like the lighting. FIX YOUR GRAVITY, AND EVERYTHING ELSE. Not trying to be mean just honest.  -Tyne

developer_response.body: What do you mean "Not trying to be mean" lol
